details: Implemented reader (TensorAccessor RM reads + scaler/eps), compute (tilize+reduce+sub+untilize), writer (TensorAccessor RM writes). Ready to test.

Fixed double HW init: removed binary_op_init_common, use only compute_kernel_hw_startup(cb_in_rm, cb_tilized). Previous hang was caused by calling both binary_op_init_common and compute_kernel_hw_startup.

Passthrough (tilize+untilize only) works fine. Now re-adding reduce+sub with fixed HW init: compute_kernel_hw_startup(cb_in_rm, cb_scaler, cb_out_rm) 3-arg form, NoWaitPopAtEnd for cb_tilized in sub (already waited by reduce).
